summary: Full backend + frontend testing for Yash Raj Rathi PM portfolio. 13/13 backend pytest tests pass (auth, portfolio CRUD, section updates, validation). Frontend e2e verified: landing/hero/overline, nav scroll, admin login dialog opens with header-login-button, login with seeded credentials returns token and reveals Edit Mode + edit-* buttons, hero hook edit persisted and rendered, add-project flow created a new card (count 5->6), delete-project removed it (6->5), logout (EXIT button) clears Edit Mode badge and edit buttons. No critical issues found.

issues: Radix DialogContent missing aria-describedby/Description (a11y warning in console). Non-blocking but should add <DialogDescription/> for screen readers.

action_items: Optional: add DialogDescription to dialog components to remove Radix a11y console warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is configured AFTER startup() may use it (logger.info in startup); reorder logging.basicConfig before startup handler.
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to FastAPI lifespan handlers.
PUT /api/portfolio/section/{section} returns 422 on validation failure but spec says 400 for invalid section (correctly 400); good.
CORS allow_origins reads from env with fallback '*' combined with allow_credentials=True is not honored by browsers; for prod set explicit origins.
Project/Experience update endpoints accept partial payload (good), but validate full merged model (good).
seed_data_creation: None permanent; test created+deleted TEST_ projects/experience via API and one QA_TEST_PROJ_UNIQ via UI which was deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py. Logout button text is 'EXIT' with data-testid='header-logout-button'. Add Project save button uses text 'ADD PROJECT' (not 'Save'). Hero edit uses textarea for 'hook'. Dialog descriptions are missing (Radix a11y warning).
